reason: The publication-first plan required >=0.95 first-action agreement and value difference <0.005 but did not define how value differences across states were aggregated. The v2 implementation used the maximum over 20 states without prior justification. V2 is preserved. V3 prospectively defines the mean absolute difference as primary and q95 as a tail guard; no confirmation roots have been opened.

v3_family.reason_modes: v2 action agreement was 1.0 for scenario at every tested horizon and <=0.15 for robust/constraint-aware beyond H1; unstable modes are not eligible

selection: Among converged configurations, maximize absolute pooled complete-cohort ReT, then ret_full and worst-product fill, never retained-minus-reset or learner return.
